Off Calendar Apr-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Hong Le, Esq., 415-554-3958 Deputy City Attorney for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Unopposed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS JOHNATHON NG, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-21-595136 WITH CASE CGC-21-591955.

Defendants' unopposed motion to consolidate CGC-21-591955 and CGC-21-595136 is granted; the former shall be the lead case.

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
